llm_unified_plan.aggregation_instruction: Combine campaign and segment data from pass_1 to provide a comprehensive view of campaign-segment relationships, including segment labels and metadata.

passes.expected_result: List of campaigns with associated segments and labels

sql.query: SELECT c.CAMPAIGNID, c.CAMPAIGNNAME, s.SEGMENTID, s.SEGMENTNAME, bcs.LABELSSEGMENT FROM dim_campaign c LEFT JOIN br_campaign_segment bcs ON c.CAMPAIGNID = bcs.CAMPAIGNID LEFT JOIN dim_segment s ON bcs.SEGMENTID = s.SEGMENTID LIMIT 50

passes.subtask: Retrieve campaign-segment relationships and metadata from the local snapshot
